# netbox_ip_address (Data Source)

Fetches an IP address from NetBox.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `address` (String) The IP address to look up (in CIDR notation).

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description of the IP address.
- `dns_name` (String) DNS name for the IP address.
- `id` (Number) The ID of the IP address.
- `tenant` (Number) The tenant ID associated with this IP address.
- `vrf` (Number) The VRF ID associated with this IP address.
